# Output multiplier: 1.0500000000 (5%)

﻿trade_office = {
	is_foreign = yes
	stronger_power_projection = no
	max_levels = trade_office_max_level
	need_good_relation = yes
	pop_type = burghers
	
	category = trade_category
	
	employment_size = foreign_trade_employment
	
	rural_settlement = no
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	country_potential = {
		NOR = {
			AND = {
				has_reform = government_reform:japanese_imperial_family
				country_type = building
			}
			has_reform = government_reform:japanese_clan
		}
	}

	allow = {
		is_port = yes
		market = { in_trade_range_of = scope:actor }
	}
	
	
	
	build_time = trade_post_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		trade_office_requirements = {
			paper = 0.1
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	
	
	modifier = {
		merchant_capacity_from_building = 0.3
		building_owner_maritime_presence = 0.05
		merchant_power_from_building = 0.2
	}
}

embassy = {
	is_foreign = yes
	stronger_power_projection = no
	want_foreign_pop_created = no
	max_levels = 1
	need_good_relation = yes
	pop_type = nobles
	
	category = government_category
	
	employment_size = minor_noble_employment
	
	rural_settlement = no
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	
	country_potential = {
		NOR = {
			AND = {
				has_reform = government_reform:japanese_imperial_family
				country_type = building
			}
			has_reform = government_reform:japanese_clan
		}
	}

	allow = {
		is_capital = yes
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = embassy_max_rank_tt
			scope:actor.country_rank_level <= owner.country_rank_level
		}
	}
	remove_if = {
		is_no_longer_capital = yes
	}
	
	
	
	build_time = trade_post_build_time
	
	lifts_fog_of_war = yes
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		embassy_requirements = {
			paper = 1.0
			jewelry = 0.5
			
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	
	foreign_country_modifier = {
		diplomatic_capacity = 0.1
	}
	
	
	
}

missionary_building = {
	in_empty = empty
	is_foreign = yes
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = clergy
	graphical_tags = { small_religious }
	
	category = colonial_category
	
	employment_size = religious_building_employment
	
	pop_size_created = religious_building_employment
	
	rural_settlement = yes
	town = no
	city = no
	
	country_potential = {
		NOR = {
			AND = {
				has_reform = government_reform:japanese_imperial_family
				country_type = building
			}
			has_reform = government_reform:japanese_clan
		}
	}

	allow = {
		OR = { 
			is_coastal_within_range = yes	
			is_adjacent_to_owned_or_subject_owns = yes
		}
		NOT = { dominant_religion = scope:actor.religion }
	}
	
	
	

	possible_production_methods = {
		colony_maintenance
	}
	construction_demand = simple_colony_construction

	
	build_time = colonise_build_time
	
	modifier = {
		building_missionary_effort = 0.1
		local_tribal_promotion = 0.5
		local_disease_resistance = 0.05
	}
}

slave_center = {
	in_empty = any
	is_foreign = yes
	stronger_power_projection = yes
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = burghers
	
	category = colonial_category
	
	
	employment_size = foreign_trade_employment
	
	pop_size_created = foreign_trade_employment
	
	rural_settlement = yes
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	
	location_potential = {
		NOT = { dominant_religion.group = scope:actor.religion.group }
		owner ?= { religion != scope:actor.religion }
	}
	
	allow = {
		OR = {
			sub_continent = sub_continent:west_africa
			sub_continent = sub_continent:central_africa
		}
		OR = { 
			is_coastal_within_range = yes
			is_adjacent_to_owned_or_subject_owns = yes
		}
		scope:actor = { has_slavery = yes }
	}
	
	
	
	
	build_time = colonise_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		slave_center_maintenance = {
			stone = 0.1
			tools = 0.1
			firearms = 0.05
			paper = 0.05
			produced = slaves_goods
			output = 1.05

			
			debug_max_profit = -1  
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = simple_colony_construction

	
	modifier = {
		building_enslavement_power = 0.050
		local_slave_pop_satisfaction = -0.05
	}
}

overseas_trading_post = {
	in_empty = any
	is_foreign = yes
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = burghers

	stronger_power_projection = yes	
	
	category = colonial_category

	employment_size = foreign_trade_employment
	
	pop_size_created = foreign_trade_employment
	
	rural_settlement = yes
	town = no
	city = no


	country_potential = {
		NOR = {
			AND = {
				has_reform = government_reform:japanese_imperial_family
				country_type = building
			}
			has_reform = government_reform:japanese_clan
		}
	}

	location_potential = {
		NOT = { continent = scope:actor.capital.continent }
	}	
	allow = {
		OR = { 
			is_coastal_within_range = yes
			is_adjacent_to_owned_or_subject_owns = yes
		}
	}
	
	

	possible_production_methods = {
		fur_trading_post_maintenance
	}
	construction_demand = simple_colony_construction

	
	build_time = colonise_build_time
	
	modifier = {
		merchant_capacity_from_building = 0.1
		merchant_power_from_building = 0.2
	}
	
}





colonial_administration = {
	is_foreign = yes
	need_good_relation = yes
	
	
	want_foreign_pop_created = no
	pop_type = burghers

	max_levels = guild_max_level
	
	category = colonial_category

	employment_size = foreign_trade_employment
	
	pop_size_created = foreign_trade_employment
	
	rural_settlement = no
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	location_potential = {
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = colonial_administration_in_colony_only
			owner ?= {
				is_subject_type = colonial_nation
				overlord ?= {
					THIS = scope:actor
				}
			}
		}
	}

	
	remove_if = {
		location.owner = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { is_subject_type = colonial_nation }
				NOT = {
					overlord ?= {
						THIS = root.owner
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	
	

	unique_production_methods = {
		colonial_administration_requirements = {
			paper = 0.1
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = simple_colony_construction

	
	build_time = colonise_build_time
	
	modifier = {
		merchant_capacity_from_building = 0.2
		merchant_power_from_building = 0.2
	}
	
}

merchant_guild_chapel = {
	is_foreign = yes
	need_good_relation = yes
	want_foreign_pop_created = no
	pop_type = clergy

	max_levels = 1
	expensive = yes
	category = colonial_category

	employment_size = religious_building_employment
	
	pop_size_created = religious_building_employment

	price = merchant_guild_chapel_price
	
	rural_settlement = setup_only
	town = setup_only
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	country_potential = {
		has_reform = government_reform:merchant_republic
	}
	
	possible_production_methods = { merchant_guild_chapel_requirements }
	construction_demand = merchant_guild_chapel_construction

	
	build_time = generic_town_build_time
	
	modifier = {
		local_max_literacy = 2
	}

	capital_country_modifier = {
		monthly_religious_influence = 0.2
	}
}

viceroyalty = {
	is_foreign = yes
	stronger_power_projection = yes
	want_foreign_pop_created = no
	pop_type = nobles
	max_levels = 1

	category = government_category

	employment_size = large_noble_employment

	rural_settlement = no
	town = no
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	location_potential = {
		custom_tooltip = {
			text = viceroyalty_in_colonial_capital_only
			is_capital = yes
			owner ?= {
				is_subject_type = colonial_nation
				overlord ?= scope:actor
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		is_capital = yes
		owner ?= {
			is_subject_type = colonial_nation
			overlord ?= scope:actor
		}
	}

	remove_if = {
		is_no_longer_capital = yes
	}

	build_time = government_build_time

	unique_production_methods = {
		viceroyalty_maintenance = {
			fine_cloth = 1
			paper = 3
			furniture = 0.5
			goods_gold = 0.5
			jewelry = 0.5

			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = local_governor_construction

	modifier = {
		merchant_capacity_from_building = 0.3
		merchant_power_from_building = 0.2
		local_crown_estate_power = 1
	}

	foreign_country_modifier = {
		subject_income_modifier = 0.1
	}
}
